conditions.message: The implementation reuses existing config/scaffold flows instead of adding parallel verifier-specific plumbing.

internal/scaffold/apply.go adds only VerifierConfigured to ApplyOptions.
internal/scaffold/agents_template.go passes existing options into template data rather than importing config into scaffold.

conditions.message: Standing verifier authorization is recorded as config/policy metadata and explicitly not treated as verifier evidence.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2578 verified the old unconditional NTM authorization sentence was removed from both AGENTS templates.
The new conditional Verifier Orchestration section states authorization is never per-cell evidence and every feature x condition cell still needs real verifier output.
git diff --cached -- internal/backpressure internal/attestations produced no output, so no gate/evidence ingestion path was changed.

conditions.message: The project-config write path is confirmation-gated, merge-preserving, and does not add destructive commands.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2577 verified runInit calls confirmScaffoldMutation before maybeAskInitVerifierAuthorization.
recordProjectVerifierAuthorization reads existing config and writes bvconfig.Merge(existing, update), preserving existing settings.
The staged diff adds no delete/reset/force/network/secret/auth-bypass operation.

conditions.message: The config data flow preserves verifier authorization metadata and source integrity, including project revocation of global authorization.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2578 verified TestConfigShowJSONIncludesSources covers project authorized=false overriding global true with source rows.
TestRecordProjectVerifierAuthorizationWritesProjectConfig verifies existing shell config remains after recording verifier authorization.
TestRobotsConfigInitCanRevokeVerifierAuthorization verifies robot input can write authorized=false and related metadata.

conditions.message: Authorization to spawn read-only verifier subagents is bounded as explicit config/policy metadata and does not grant permissions or handle secrets/network/API behavior.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2578 verified maybeAskInitVerifierAuthorization asks the explicit read-only verifier authorization question with default false unless configured.
recordProjectVerifierAuthorization records repo-scoped metadata with SpawnMethod manual and Transcripts summary.
No internal/backpressure or internal/attestations changes are staged.

conditions.message: The staged behavior adds constant-size prompt/config/template plumbing, not expensive runtime fanout or repeated work.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2577 verified the runtime additions are constant-size config checks, one optional interactive init prompt/write, and one boolean passed to scaffold rendering.
No goroutines, subprocess fanout, network calls, filesystem walks, or nested loops are introduced.
go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The UX keeps autonomous behavior bounded: init asks once before recording project authorization, robots require confirm:true, and generated AGENTS says authorization is not cell evidence.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2578 verified runInit prompts only in wizard mode, reloads effective config, and passes VerifierConfigured for conditional rendering.
maybeAskInitVerifierAuthorization respects existing defaults.verifier.authorized sources and otherwise uses default false.
TestRobotsConfigInitCanRevokeVerifierAuthorization proves robot input can revoke authorization.
